title: The Cryptic Message of the Zodiac Killer

scenes.text: A series of coded messages sent by an unidentified killer, still unsolved.
The Zodiac Killer operated in Northern California during the late 1960s and early 1970s.
Despite multiple attempts, the final cipher has yet to be decoded, leaving investigators stumped.
Could these messages hold the key to identifying the killer?
scenes.label: HIDDEN TRUTHS?

scenes.text: Follow for the cases no one can explain.

description: 📍 California, USA - Late 1960s to 70s. The Zodiac Killer's encrypted messages tantalize detectives, yet remain decoded after decades. Follow for daily mysteries!
